needs_state.reason: handler requires target_handle (m08kcFindHandle 'target_handle'/'handle', optional 'target_handle2') naming an already-resident AcDbEntity to add to a 2D constraint group; a stateless fixture has no real object handle to supply (m08kc_handlers.inc line 367-402).
same handler block as define.constraint.dimensional.distance; requires target_handle for a pre-existing circular/arc entity handle already in the drawing database (m08kc_handlers.inc line 367-402).

handler requires target_handle (m08kcFindHandle 'target_handle'/'handle', optional 'target_handle2') naming pre-existing entity handle(s) with an edge subentity to constrain; no construction-from-args path exists (m08kc_handlers.inc line 331-366).
handler requires dimension_handle (m08kcFindHandle 'dimension_handle'/'handle') naming an already-resident AcDbDimension entity to attach the AcDbDimAssoc to (m08kc_handlers.inc line 403-417).

handler requires BOTH action_handle (existing AcDbAssocAction) and target_handle (existing entity) already resident in the drawing database; no args-only construction path (m08kc_handlers.inc line 774-824).

handler requires target_handle (m08kcFindHandle 'target_handle'/'handle') naming a pre-existing entity whose real subentities (edges/faces/vertices) are enumerated via subentPtr; no entity to probe without prior state (m08kc_handlers.inc line 864-905).

handler requires action_handle (m08kcFindHandle 'action_handle'/'handle') naming an action already present in the top-level assoc network (e.g. created by a prior define.parameter.variable/merge call); a fresh stateless fixture has no action to remove (m08kc_handlers.inc line 534-556).
